name: BuiltWith
description: Tech-stack profiler for any website. Critical signal for AI prospection — knowing whether a target uses Intercom (no AI), Salesforce (enterprise), Shopify (SMB), or no analytics at all tells you exactly what to pitch. Also lists tech relationships (e.g. 'all sites using HubSpot in France').

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API key
credential_fields.description: BuiltWith API key from api.builtwith.com (Domain API + Lists API plan recommended)

tools.name: domain_lookup
tools.description: Get the full technology profile of a domain: every tracked tech, when it was first/last seen, category. Use to qualify a prospect ('do they use any AI tooling?').

HIDETEXT.description: Strip raw HTML evidence to reduce response size

tools.name: list_sites_by_tech
tools.description: List of websites that use a given technology. The single best lead-gen query: 'all SMBs in France using Calendly but no live-chat tool'. Costs more credits than a domain lookup.

SINCE.description: ISO date — only sites first detected after this

tools.name: relationships
tools.description: Get sister/parent/child sites that share infrastructure (Google Analytics ID, AdSense, etc.) with the lookup domain. Useful for finding portfolio companies of a single owner.

tools.name: trends
tools.description: Adoption trend (popularity over time) for a single technology.

tools.name: keywords
tools.description: Keywords detected on a domain (meta keywords, headings) — use for ICP language research.
